name: etus-open-telemetry
description: Opt-in telemetry for Etus open source projects

scripts.dev:reset: pkill -f next-server || true; pkill -f 'next/dist/bin/next' || true; pkill -f workerd || true; pkill -f miniflare || true; rm -rf packages/dashboard/.next packages/site/.next packages/dashboard/.turbo packages/site/.turbo
